pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh which copies/verifies this path.
Verified against setup_task.sh which cleans up this exact path prior to execution.
Verified against Jamovi 'jmv' R package documentation for the Friedman test and verifier.py logic.
Verified by inspecting the BFI25.csv dataset headers which match the task instructions.
Contradicted by verifier.py, which explicitly checks for a minimum file size of 1000 bytes (os.path.getsize(temp_omv.name) < 1000).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real BFI-25 dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv. The expected output is a Jamovi (.omv) file at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/FriedmanAgreeableness.omv containing a Friedman test (anovaRMNP) on variables A1, A2, A3, A4, and A5. The output file must be at least 1000 bytes as checked by the verifier (contradicting the metadata claim of 5000).
